name: Do-si-do Brownies
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES: Preheat oven to 350°F. Cream butter and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Sift flour and cocoa powder together into a separate bowl. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the butter-sugar mixture, alternating with the peanuts, vanilla extract, and marshmallows. Stir in the peanut butter chips. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and spread the marshmallow, peanut butter chip, and crushed Do-Si-Do cookie mixture over the brownies. Return to oven for an additional 10 minutes. Allow cooling completely before icing.
ICING: Melt butter. Sift cocoa powder and powdered sugar into a bowl. Stir in melted butter, evaporated milk, and chopped peanuts until smooth. Spread over cooled brownies.
